profile.name: Ahmed Elgohary
profile.description: A software engineer skilled in ASP.NET Core backends, modern frontends with React, and cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter. I build complete, production-ready systems from database to UI.

text: Hello! I'm Ahmed Elgohary — a software engineer who builds complete systems from the ground up.
I work across the full stack: backend APIs with ASP.NET Core, modern frontends with React, and cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter. I build complete, production-ready systems from database to UI.

Currently studying Computer Science (Information Systems) at Mansoura University. I love solving complex problems, picking up new technologies fast, and shipping clean, secure systems that make a real impact.

projects.title: HR Management System
projects.description: A full-featured HR system with secure RESTful APIs, JWT authentication.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Ecommerce solution with cart and admin panel using clean architecture.

projects.title: Smart Invoice App
projects.description: Mobile application for tracking invoices with automatic tax calculus.

projects.title: Receipt Tracking
projects.description: Financial tracking system implementing "safe box" treasury feature.

certificates.title: Mean Stack Development
details: Mastered the MEAN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, Angular, Node.js).
Built dynamic, high-performance web applications with a unified JS ecosystem.
Implemented secure authentication and real-time data handling solutions.

certificates.title: Foundational C#
details: Comprehensive certification covering C# fundamentals and advanced concepts.
Developed deep understanding of object-oriented programming in C#.
Earned in collaboration with Microsoft and freeCodeCamp.

certificates.title: Victoris AI Competition
details: Winner of the Victoris 4.0 Competition for AI-Powered Applications.
Developed innovative solutions using advanced Artificial Intelligence.
Ranked at the top among competitive undergraduate tracks.
